<!-- indicator: fig-rc-impact-eco-wellbeing -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-rc-impact-eco-wellbeing
#| fig-cap: 'The Impact of Economic Wellbeing in Rockland County (n = 127)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization of The Impact of Economic Wellbeing in Rockland County (n = 127).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-rc-eco-wellbeing", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
